title: Testing, Debugging, and Quality Evidence · Traceback Repair Bay
summary: Verify the command-line data tool across pure logic, filesystem boundaries, failures, and changed inputs. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a tested data-report release candidate and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use assertions for programmer invariants and tests rather than recoverable user validation.
Test one observable behavior with arrange-act-assert structure, deterministic data, and meaningful failure output.
Use fixtures and parametrized cases to expose meaningful variation without shared mutable test state.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
